inputs.name: WebSiteName
inputs.label: Website Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of an existing IIS website on the target machine

inputs.name: AppName
inputs.label: Application Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional IIS virtual application name within the site. Leave empty to deploy the site root.

inputs.name: SourcePath
inputs.label: Source Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the source directory that will be deployed

inputs.name: DestinationPath
inputs.label: Destination Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the parent directory where versioned release folders will be created. Leave empty to use the parent folder of the current site directory.

inputs.name: ReleasePrefix
inputs.label: Release folder prefix
inputs.helpMarkDown: Prefix used for the versioned release folders (e.g. 'r_' produces r_1, r_2, ...)

inputs.name: NumberToKeep
inputs.label: Number of releases to keep
inputs.helpMarkDown: Number of previous deployments to retain
